meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve no coding experience (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome no coding experience. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Build SaaS Without Coding
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between idea and MVP. Learn how to master Claude Code and Antigravity to build professional SaaS products without writing a single line of code.
content.answer_block: Claude Code transforms natural language into production-ready architecture. By configuring custom skills and leveraging Antigravity, you bypass traditional syntax barriers. This setup allows you to iterate on business logic, manage database schemas, and deploy full-stack applications by treating your product roadmap as a set of executable instructions.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is filled with founders who waited for the 'perfect' technical co-founder or spent months learning syntax instead of validating market demand. The bottleneck is no longer capability; it is execution speed. You are standing at the precipice of a new era where the barrier between a vision and a deployed asset is collapsing.

Claude Code, paired with the structural orchestration of Antigravity, acts as your senior engineering team. You don't need to learn C++ or React; you need to learn how to architect systems and direct AI to build them. This tutorial is your blueprint for turning high-level business logic into a scalable, revenue-generating reality.

steps.title: Environment Orchestration
steps.description: Initialize your workspace to ensure Claude has context of your project structure and business goals.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my project directory and create a 'system_manifest.md' that defines our core business objectives, target user personas, and the MVP feature set to ensure all future code remains aligned.

steps.title: Defining Functional Schemas
steps.description: Establish the database architecture. Claude needs to understand your data relationships before writing logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a relational database schema for a subscription-based SaaS. Include tables for users, billing, and project assets, optimized for high-read performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create database schema based on system_manifest.md'

steps.title: Implementing Business Logic
steps.description: Translate your revenue model into code. Focus on the core 'value-add' feature first.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build the core service layer that handles user authentication and the primary value proposition defined in our manifest.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement core service logic with error handling'

steps.title: Automated Quality Assurance
steps.description: Use Claude to write tests that verify your app logic, ensuring stability before you ship.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit tests for all critical business logic paths to ensure our subscription flow is secure and error-free.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate and execute unit tests for all service modules'

steps.title: Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Configure the final build and deployment scripts to get your product live to users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment script that packages our application and sets up a production-ready environment on our chosen cloud provider.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate deployment configuration and start build process'

pro_tips: Always reference your 'system_manifest.md' in every prompt to prevent 'AI drift' where the code deviates from your business goals.
Use Claude Code to refactor your own code periodically; ask it to 'optimize for maintainability' to keep your codebase clean for future scaling.
Break massive features into 50-line chunks. Claude performs significantly better when tasked with specific, modular functions rather than 'build the whole dashboard'.
Keep your documentation inside the code. Ask Claude to update comments every time it modifies a function to ensure your project remains legible for future hires.
Treat your error logs as data. Feed Claude the exact error message from the CLI; it excels at debugging when given the specific stack trace.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is deployed, begin the feedback loop by integrating a simple analytics tool to track user behavior and iterate on your features.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical leverage of a ten-person engineering team. Stop dreaming about the product and start shipping it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
